svg.title: Fallback chain diagram
svg.desc: A vertical flowchart showing the three-tier fallback chain. Input validation rejects invalid inputs. Resource check diverts to fallback if memory or CPU is over threshold. Tier 1 DistilBERT passes if confidence is above 0.60, otherwise falls to Tier 2 keyword heuristics, which passes if there is a clear match, otherwise escalates to Tier 3 human review queue. Every path produces the same response shape.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does input validation check for?')
sendPrompt('What does input validation check for?')
sendPrompt('What does a rejected status mean?')
sendPrompt('What thresholds trigger the resource check fallback?')
sendPrompt('What happens to requests that hit the resource limit?')
sendPrompt('How does the DistilBERT confidence gate work?')
sendPrompt('What does a status=ok response look like?')
sendPrompt('How do the keyword heuristics work in Tier 2?')
sendPrompt('What does a status=ok response look like from tier 2?')
sendPrompt('How does the human review queue work?')
